Name: Password policy check
Description: This indicator evaluates the password policies in place and verifies if they adhere to Okta's recommendations.
LikelihoodOfCompromise: A strong password policy is crucial in preventing unauthorized access to the environment through brute-force attacks.
ResultMessage: Found {0} Password policies that do not meet Okta recommendations.
Remediation:
To ensure a robust password policy, please consider the following recommendations:
  • Set a password lockout threshold of 10 or more failed login attempts. This helps protect against brute-force password attacks.
  • Implement a minimum password history of 24 passwords. This prevents users from reusing previously compromised or weak passwords.
  • Establish a minimum password age of one hour. This ensures that users cannot immediately change their password to bypass the password history requirement.
  • Specify a minimum password length of 12 characters or more. Longer passwords offer increased resilience against brute-force attacks.
  • Consider restricting the use of common or easily guessable passwords, as recommended by Okta.
